Asparagus Soup is a Crock Pot dish introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It requires at least one raw or cooked Asparagus, and at least another 0.5 Vegetables. Asparagus Soup takes 10 seconds to cook and restores 20 Health, 18.75 Hunger and 5 Sanity when eaten.

Trivia

  • Asparagus Soup was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • During the Pig Fiesta event in Hamlet, Asparagus Soup takes on a more festive appearance.

“Asparagus again? Er, not that I'm complaining...”

“A nice warm bowl of soup.”

'''Asparagus Soup''' is a [[Crock Pot]] dish introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires at least one raw or cooked [[Asparagus]], and at least another 0.5 [[Vegetables]]. Asparagus Soup takes 10 seconds to cook and restores 20 Health, 18.75 Hunger and 5 Sanity when eaten.

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Asparaguses.png|link=Asparagus]]
* Requires: [[File:Crock Pot Vegetables (no Mandrake).png|link=Vegetables]]

== {{pic|32|Icon Science}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe

|item2 = Vegetables
|count2 = (0.5)
|item3 = Filler
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Asparagus Soup
}}

|item3=Monster Meat
|item4=Monster Meat
}}
== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Asparagus Soup was introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Warly Character Update]].
* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event in ''Hamlet'', Asparagus Soup takes on a more festive appearance.
